title: TSLA Just Flashed a Rare Bull Signal - 1M Analysis Inside
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
Tesla's chart just triggered a high-probability breakout pattern we haven't seen since last earnings surge.

Key signals spotted in our Katy 1M model:

* RSI divergence signaling momentum shift
* Volume spike 47% above 30-day average
* Breaking key resistance at $245 with clean candle close

Historical backtesting shows this configuration preceded 82% of TSLA's major rallies in past 24 months, with average 18% moves within 30 days.
